name: AETERNUM HEALTH, INC.
business: The company is a transportation electrification company that builds, deploys and operates plug-in stations for electric vehicles, trucks and refrigerated trailers. It currently operates the largest heavy-duty focused network of electrified parking spaces in North America, including 60 facilities with approximately 1,800 electrified parking spaces. The company sells to fleets and drivers seeking cost savings from reducing petroleum fuel use.

exposures.sentence: We are a transportation electrification company that builds, deploys and operates plug-in stations that allow electric vehicles, trucks and refrigerated trailers to conveniently access electric power while parked or staged.
Our engineers are working on a higher-speed DC fast charger that could include internal battery energy storage.
It could even be used at temporary venues such as concerts and sporting events with the optional solar array.

catalysts.event: Invoicing for completed Washington State Level 2 charging stations to be processed next quarter
catalysts.sentence: Invoicing for these projects will be processed next quarter.

catalysts.event: Launch of cost-effective Level 2 charging station in the next quarter
catalysts.sentence: We also recently developed a cost-effective Level 2 charging station to be competitive with other chargers imported from Asia. This product will be launched in the next quarter.
